case_title: AMERICAN GENERAL REALTY ADVISORS vs. VIAFAX COPYSYSTEMS, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN GENERAL REALTY ADVISORS SERVED MAY-21-1996, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT VIAFAX COPYSYSTEMS, INC.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT VIAFAX COPYSYSTEMS, INC.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT VIAFAX COPYSYSTEMS, INC.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN GENERAL REALTY ADVISORS AS TO DEFENDANT VIAFAX COPYSYSTEMS, INC. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN GENERAL REALTY ADVISORS AS TO DEFENDANT VIAFAX COPYSYSTEMS, INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VIAFAX COPYSYSTEMS, INC. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1301 EVANS AVE, LEASE FORFEITED
